title: x-treme cheese pull norwegian speck gratin
description: a sweet and savory norwegian dish featuring crispy speck, melted cheese, and a crunchy katsuramuki topping. perfect for a comforting dinner or snack.
instructions: dust the wooden board with flour for easy cleanup.
in a large bowl, mix together the sliced speck, katsuramuki-cut potatoes, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
spread the speck and potato mixture evenly over the wooden board.
dot the top of the speck and potato mixture with the melted butter.
in a separate bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and gruyère and parmesan cheese until smooth.
pour the cheese sauce over the speck and potato mixture, making sure to cover the entire surface.
sprinkle the grated cheese over the top of the cheese sauce.
bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
use a spatula to carefully loosen the gratin from the wooden board.
slide the gratin onto a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
